results.rendered_html:
pra-√kup P. -kupyati, to be moved or agitated;
to become enraged, fly into a passion,  MBh. ;  R.  &c.:
Caus. -kopayati, to set in motion, agitate, excite, provoke to anger,  Mn. ;  MBh.  &c.

results.rendered_html:
prakup 4 P.
1 To be angry, to be enraged or provoked at: nimittamuviśya hi yaḥ prakupyati dhruvaṃ sa tasyāpagame prasīdati  Pt. 1. 283. 
2 To be excited, gather strength, increase.
— Caus. To provoke, irritate, exasperate;
(pb) sādhoḥ prakīpitasyāpi mano nāyāti vikriyāma  Subhāṣ.
